message: SYSTEM ONLINE: Environmental sensors active. Beginning multi-year dive sequence.
CRITICAL: PENNATULOIDEA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause.

CRITICAL: LEPTOGORGIA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. ALSO: EUGORGIA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. ALSO: BALTICINA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. ALSO: PTILOSARCUS population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. ALSO: PENNATULOIDEA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. ALSO: ANTIPATHES population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. ALSO: PARAGORGIA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. | ALERT: Major decline in overall fish biomass detected. System instability rising.

CRITICAL: EUGORGIA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. | WARNING: Black Coral and Bubblegum Coral reached bleaching threshold. Vitality dropping. | ALERT: Major decline in overall fish biomass detected. System instability rising.
CRITICAL: PENNATULOIDEA population has crashed. Habitat loss is likely the cause. | ALERT: Major decline in overall fish biomass detected. System instability rising.
CRITICAL: Widespread bleaching observed! Sea Whip Pen, Bright Sea Fan, Soft Coral and others are dying.
SYSTEM FAILURE: Ecosystem collapse imminent. Eco-vitality at critical levels.
